## Agents

### Bug Fixer Agent

- **Name:** Bug Fixer Agent
- **Role:** Automatically addresses and fixes bugs in the project.
- **GitHub Account:** [@moizlkwfcc](https://github.com/moizlkwfcc)
- **Responsibilities:**
  - Identifying bug reports
  - Assigning themselves to bug issues
  - Proposing and committing fixes
  - Following up with code reviews or documentation as needed

---

> **Note:** This agent is currently represented by the account [@moizlkwfcc](https://github.com/moizlkwfcc). To make this more “bot-like,” you can later create a separate bot account or integrate automation tools that act on your behalf.
